Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3000 "WEATHERWARII-3000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Weatherwar II.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $087F. Therefore the following changes were made: 1. Removed the SYS 900 ($0384) instruction at the beginning of line 4. This is because this is not only is below $0400, but it also contains a protection check to ensure the game was loaded from tape. 2. An init routine has been added at $3000 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers, so the execution can start at the point the loader has finished and start the game. 3. This routine also contains the init code originally found at $0388. 4. It then executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $A7AE after the first part of the game has loaded.
